title: rhodanthemum arundanum subsp. mairei
intro: Rhodanthemum arundanum subsp. mairei is a plant species within the Asteraceae family, commonly known as the arundo mairei or the Rhodanthemum mairei, which is a shrub-like perennial herb with attractive white and pink flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, helping to combat various health issues. The health benefits of Rhodanthemum arundanum subsp. mairei include reducing inflammation and fighting infections, as well as exhibiting antioxidant properties to protect against cell damage. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are typically made by steeping the leaves and flowers in hot water or extracting the active compounds with a solvent.
